negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday range third transition rank over dynamic day-range third boundary distance, boundary transition depth, third reclaim strength, day range memory, boundary wick absorption, close-location commitment, transition impulse, participation reengagement, prior-day range context, session transition pressure, and spread stress features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0087 R0001 shows the tested range third transition surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0087 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0088 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 2 profitable and 7 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -73.87, and worst fold rw_006 net PnL -17.33.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by -7.68 total net PnL across 4 better and 5 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0087 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or range-third-transition feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday range third transition rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0087 R0001 tests whether closed-M5 transitions through dynamic intraday day-range third boundaries can rank target-first escape path quality after a prior probe/dwell around lower or upper thirds. It changes anchor family, feature surface, label conditioning, model fit context, and trade-logic state key from C0086 opening-balance midpoint reanchor. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0086 opening-balance midpoint thresholds, windows, stops, targets, sessions, spread gates, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.
